metadata.description: Location for all resources.
Name prefix for your AI Services (Cognitive Services) resource. Lowercase alphanumeric only; a 4-character random suffix will be appended.
The name of the model you want to deploy
The provider of your model
The version of your model
The sku of your model deployment
The tokens per minute (TPM) of your model deployment
Name prefix for your Foundry project. A 4-character random suffix will be appended.

projectDescription.defaultValue: A project for the AI Foundry account with network secured deployed Agent

metadata.description: This project will be a sub-resource of your account
The display name of the project
Virtual Network name. When `existingVnetResourceId` is set, this is ignored — the name is derived from the resource ID.
Agent subnet name. Ignored when `existingAgentSubnetResourceId` is set.
Private endpoint subnet name. Ignored when `existingPeSubnetResourceId` is set.
MCP subnet name (hosts user-deployed Container Apps such as MCP servers). Ignored when `existingMcpSubnetResourceId` is set.
Existing Virtual Network name Resource ID
Address space for the VNet (only used for new VNet)
Address prefix for the agent subnet. The default value is 192.168.0.0/24 but you can choose any size /26 or any class like 10.0.0.0 or 172.168.0.0
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
Address prefix for the MCP subnet. The default value is 192.168.2.0/24.
Optional ARM Resource ID of an existing agent subnet. If provided, the subnet will be referenced as-is and will not be created/modified.
Optional ARM Resource ID of an existing private endpoint subnet. If provided, the subnet will be referenced as-is and will not be created/modified.
Optional ARM Resource ID of an existing MCP subnet. If provided, the subnet will be referenced as-is and will not be created/modified.
The AI Search Service full ARM Resource ID. Optional — leave empty to create a new one.
The AI Storage Account full ARM Resource ID. Optional — leave empty to create a new one.
The Cosmos DB Account full ARM Resource ID. Optional — leave empty to create a new one.
The Microsoft Fabric Workspace full ARM Resource ID. Optional — enables Fabric private link connectivity.
Enable Azure Container Registry with Private Endpoint. When true, creates an ACR (Premium SKU) with a PE in the private endpoints subnet.
Optional developer IP CIDR to allowlist for ACR push access (e.g., 203.0.113.0/26 or 10.0.0.0/16). When empty, public access remains disabled.

Map of private DNS zone FQDNs to an object `{ subscriptionId, resourceGroup }` describing where the zone lives. Empty `resourceGroup` means "create the zone in this deployment's resource group". A non-empty `resourceGroup` references an existing zone in that RG; empty `subscriptionId` defaults to the current subscription, otherwise the zone is referenced cross-subscription. Note: when referencing an existing zone, the VNet link to that zone is NOT managed by this template — the caller must ensure the zone is already linked to the target VNet.
The name of the project capability host to be created
Azure region for the deployment
The name of the virtual network
Indicates if an existing VNet should be used
Subscription ID of the existing VNet (if different from current subscription)
Resource Group name of the existing VNet (if different from current resource group)
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Private Endpoint subnet
The name of MCP subnet for user-deployed Container Apps
Address space for the VNet (only used for new VNet)
Address prefix for the agent subnet
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
Address prefix for the MCP subnet
Set to true to reference the agent subnet as existing (do not create or modify it)
Set to true to reference the private endpoint subnet as existing (do not create or modify it)
Set to true to reference the MCP subnet as existing (do not create or modify it)
Azure region for the deployment
The name of the virtual network
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Hub subnet
The name of MCP subnet for user-deployed Container Apps
Address space for the VNet
Address prefix for the agent subnet
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
Address prefix for the MCP subnet
The name of the existing virtual network
Subscription ID of virtual network (if different from current subscription)
Resource Group name of the existing VNet (if different from current resource group)
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Private Endpoint subnet
The name of MCP subnet for user-deployed Container Apps
Address prefix for the agent subnet (only needed if creating new subnet)
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet (only needed if creating new subnet)
Address prefix for the MCP subnet (only needed if creating new subnet)
Set to true to reference the agent subnet as existing (do not create or modify it)
Set to true to reference the private endpoint subnet as existing (do not create or modify it)
Set to true to reference the MCP subnet as existing (do not create or modify it)

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 0)), createObject('value', parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')))]

metadata.description: Name of the virtual network
Name of the subnet
Address prefix for the subnet (only required when creating a new subnet)
Array of subnet delegations
Set to true to reference an existing subnet instead of creating one

subnetId.value: [if(parameters('subnetExists'), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]))]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('peSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 1)), createObject('value', parameters('peSubnetPrefix')))]

Name of the subnet

subnetId.value: [if(parameters('subnetExists'), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1]))]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('mcpSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 2)), createObject('value', parameters('mcpSubnetPrefix')))]

Map of DNS zone FQDNs to an object describing where the zone lives. Each value must be an object with optional `subscriptionId` and `resourceGroup` properties. Empty `resourceGroup` means "create the zone in this deployment's resource group". Non-empty `resourceGroup` references an existing zone; empty `subscriptionId` defaults to the current subscription.
Fully-qualified DNS zone name (e.g. privatelink.openai.azure.com).
Resource group of an existing zone. Empty means create the zone in this RG.
Subscription ID of an existing zone. Empty defaults to the current subscription. Only used when existingResourceGroup is non-empty.
ARM ID of the VNet to link the zone to.
Suffix used to make the vnet-link name unique.
Disable the entire module (zone, link, output). Used to skip optional zones.
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Azure region for the ACR
Resource ID of the Private Endpoint subnet
Resource ID of the Virtual Network
Suffix for unique resource names
Resource group name for existing ACR DNS zone. Empty string means create a new zone.
Subscription ID where existing private DNS zones are located.
Optional developer IP CIDR to allowlist for ACR push access (e.g., 203.0.113.0/26 or 10.0.0.0/16). When empty, public access remains disabled.
Principal ID of the project managed identity to grant AcrPull role. When empty, no role assignment is created.
Resource ID of the Azure Container Registry
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Login server URL of the Azure Container Registry
Name of the Cosmos DB resource
Principal ID of the AI project

variables.conditionStr: [format('((!(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/tags/read''}})  AND  !(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/filter/action''}}) AND  !(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/tags/write''}}) ) OR (@Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:name] StringStartsWithIgnoreCase ''{0}'' AND @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:name] StringLikeIgnoreCase ''*-azureml-agent''))', parameters('workspaceId'))]
